content:
Administrative Agency: Rochelle Police Dept Incident #: 200600011585 Report No. 4 Entered: 10/25/2006 16:43 By Officer: 00000208 Detective Terry Inman
Case_Nr:
Wednesday 10/25/06 I (Detective Terry Inman) met with and his
father Israel Almaraz about this case.
I took them back to the interview room and explained to them that had already been arrested on this matter and that all we were here today to determine is how to dispose of this case. I told both of them that I could choose between police supervision or going to court and fighting the charges.
I explained to them both options and with his father agreeing) chose to accept the police supervision. I placed him on 90 days supervision with the standard conditions. I added 15 hours of public service work to be coordinated with Keith Lamb at the high
school. I told that I would call Keith and let him know that
has 15
hours to complete and then Keith would get in touch with
Neither nor his father had any questions for me. After reviewing the supervision agreement with them, we all signed it were indicated and I gave them a copy of the agreement after escorting them back to the front lobby.
I returned to my office and left a voice message for Keith Lamb to call me about this.
Detective Terry Inman #208
